---
title: "Prediction of Energy Consumption in Horizontal Roughing Process of Hot Rolling Strip Based on TDADE Algorithm"
authors:
  - "Y. Zhong"
  - "Shunyu Wu"
  - "et al."
year: 2023
venue: "IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering"
status: "published"
type: "co-author"
doi: "10.1109/TASE.2023.3236306"
url: "https://doi.org/10.1109/TASE.2023.3236306"
keywords:
  - "energy prediction"
  - "industrial optimization"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Published  
**DOI:** [10.1109/TASE.2023.3236306](https://doi.org/10.1109/TASE.2023.3236306)

Selected collaboration on energy consumption forecasting in industrial rolling processes.
